title: Common identifiers
description: Shared identifier and primitive value $defs consumed by other contracts via $ref. This file defines no root type — $defs only.
$comment: compat_class: closed ($defs-only reuse surface, no additionalProperties root to seal since there is no root object). Authority: approved plan §2 row 1 (docs/decisions ADR references below); ruling R1 (docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §1.1) — engine_id is intentionally NOT defined here, it lives in common/engine-id/v1 as a standalone file so it is not duplicated across two contracts. tenant_id pattern is verbatim from ADR-0014 (docs/decisions/ADR-0014-tenant-propagation.md, 'tenant_id 형식' section) — do not reinvent. timestamp_utc uses a Z-canonical pattern per ADR-0013 rev.2 (occurred_at Z-정준화 amendment, docs/decisions/ADR-0013-event-envelope-v1.md). sha256_ref/git_sha/uri_ref support cross-contract hash and reference fields (ChangePlan H-3/H-7, SourceSnapshot, PatchArtifact — W1 P0 domain contracts, not yet authored in this unit).

tenant_id.$comment: Verbatim from ADR-0014 (docs/decisions/ADR-0014-tenant-propagation.md) — immutable DNS-safe slug, max 32 chars, sized to fit under the 'saena-tenant-<id>' <=63-char namespace convention. Do not alter this pattern without an ADR-0014 revision.

workspace_id.$comment: format OPEN — issuer runtime convention; W1 opaque

project_id.$comment: format OPEN — issuer runtime convention; W1 opaque

site_id.$comment: format OPEN — issuer runtime convention; W1 opaque

actor_id.$comment: format OPEN — issuer runtime convention; W1 opaque

run_id.$comment: format OPEN — issuer runtime convention; W1 opaque

semver.$comment: Full semver core (major.minor.patch), no prerelease/build metadata — consistent with ADR-0012 compatibility policy and ADR-0013 rev.2 prerelease exclusion amendment.

timestamp_utc.$comment: Z-canonical only (no numeric UTC offset, e.g. +00:00, accepted) per ADR-0013 rev.2 occurred_at Z-canonicalization amendment.

sha256_ref.$comment: Lowercase hex, 'sha256:' prefix required. Example form per ADR-0013:148.

uri_ref.$comment: query/fragment forbidden — presigned-token smuggling defense (ADR-0024, ruling R9-5 in docs/... virtual-cooking-map.md §1.1).
